title: Restore highlights and line tool in PDF viewer (dbg99)
description:
After the fullscreen continuous PDF viewer shipped, highlights did not appear and the Line tool could not draw new highlights. The continuous viewer has no data-hp-plan-world element, so worldPointFromPointer always returned null (world-point-missing).

dbg99 maps pointer coords through the clicked page slot in continuous viewer mode, draws line previews on per-page overlay SVGs, syncs map/viewer highlight mirrors on open, refreshes overlay SVGs after mount, and enables line-tool pointer events on continuous overlays.

Who is affected: OVH private server PDF Viewer fullscreen and Map Builder when using continuous viewer.
changeLog: Fix pointer-to-world coords for continuous PDF viewer (line tool + structure nodes).
Line preview and committed lines target per-page overlay SVG in viewer mode.
Refresh highlight overlays after viewer mount and on uiMode chrome update.
Sync map/viewer highlight mirrors when entering fullscreen viewer.
CSS: line-tool pointer events on continuous overlay SVG lines.
